description: CloudWM (Kamatera) API provider — cloud server management via the CloudWM REST API.

classes.name: CloudWM Provider
classes.description: CloudWM (Kamatera) API crud_provider. Extends @provider with CloudWM-specific fields (datacenter). Supports server listing, creation, and power management via REST API. Authenticates with CWM_CLIENTID and CWM_SECRET.

props.label: Datacenter
props.description: Default datacenter code for server operations (e.g. EU, IL, US-NY2). Can be overridden per action via params.

objects.name: List Servers
objects.description: List all CloudWM servers in the account. Returns server id, name, datacenter, status, CPU, RAM, and IP addresses.

params.label: Datacenter
params.description: Filter by datacenter code (e.g. EU, IL, US-NY2)

objects.name: Create Server
objects.description: Create a new CloudWM cloud server. Requires datacenter, image, CPU type, RAM, and disk configuration. Returns a job command ID — poll status to get the server ID once provisioned.

params.label: Datacenter
params.description: Datacenter code (e.g. EU, IL, US-NY2). Falls back to provider datacenter if not specified.

params.label: Image
params.description: OS image ID (e.g. IL:6000C298f5c1ec0c40a7e8c0). Use /service/servers/images to list available images.

params.label: CPU Type
params.description: CPU type code (e.g. B for burstable, D for dedicated). Use /service/servers/capabilities for options.

params.label: Root Password
params.description: Root/admin password for the new server

params.label: Network
params.description: Network configuration name (e.g. wan). Provide comma-separated for multiple NICs.

params.label: Daily Backup
params.description: Enable daily automated backup for the server

objects.name: Power On Server
objects.description: Power on a stopped CloudWM server by server name. Returns a command ID — the server will be in running state once the job completes.

params.label: Server Name
params.description: Name of the server to power on

objects.name: Power Off Server
objects.description: Power off a running CloudWM server by server name. Hard powers down the VM. Returns a command ID.

params.label: Server Name
params.description: Name of the server to power off

objects.name: CloudWM
objects.description: CloudWM (Kamatera) API provider instance. Manages cloud servers — list, create, power on/off. Configure auth with CWM_CLIENTID and CWM_SECRET environment variables.

auth._note: Set CWM_CLIENTID and CWM_SECRET environment variables with your CloudWM API credentials.
